what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-22 in the design-source channel under capital-raise; it stores YAML frontmatter with identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, source provenance, author session, creation timestamp, and a one-line body label declaring it as design ground-truth.
observations: The file records an image/jpeg asset at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-22
Width and height are both set to 0
The body states: SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-22.jpg
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite the file representing an image
It is explicitly tagged as design ground-truth source material
It contains a blob hash but no links to other records
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, and links
Uses URI-style identifiers: image://... and blob://...
Body uses a terse SOURCE design ground-truth label
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, suggesting missing or unextracted metadata
No descriptive content, alt text, or usage context is provided
No links connect this asset to related design or document records
notes: A minimal provenance stub for a capital-raise design-source image whose actual pixel dimensions and relationships are not yet filled in.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-22.jpg contain?
Why are the width and height values 0?
Is the blob hash currently resolvable or verified?
How is this image intended to be used within the capital-raise materials?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth source image; actual content is a metadata stub with a valid blob reference but zero dimensions and no descriptive links, so it partially fulfills the purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to establish a stable, authoritative identity for a source image used in capital-raise design work, linking it to an author session and a content-addressed blob.
novelty: It treats an image as a first-class ledger record with both a logical image:// address and a content-addressed blob:// reference.
contribution: It contributes a stable identity and provenance record for a design-source image asset, including a blob reference, author session, and timestamp, which a fused system can use to locate, verify, and attribute the underlying image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source image asset capital-raise/p-22, referencing a blob hash and declaring itself design ground-truth, with zero width and height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve an authoritative source image for capital-raise design materials with a stable address and provenance.
